description: Calculate the potential savings of a home battery system based on historical energy data. Using the Emoncms feed 'surplus_power' (7 days of power data in Watts at 10-minute intervals), simulate a 5.0 kWh battery with 100% efficiency starting at 0% charge. In this simulation, positive values represent surplus energy available for charging (up to 5.0 kWh), and negative values represent grid deficits that the battery can discharge to cover (down to 0.0 kWh). Determine the total energy (kWh) successfully discharged from the battery to avoid grid imports. Save the result to /home/ga/battery_simulation.json with the keys "feed_name", "battery_capacity_kwh", and "total_avoided_import_kwh". Login to Emoncms at http://localhost with username 'admin' and password 'admin'. API keys are in /home/ga/emoncms_apikeys.sh.
